phrases.intent_en: Ask where the nearest restaurant is
phrases.text_local: Où est le restaurant le plus proche ?
phrases.pronunciation: oo eh luh res-toh-RAHN luh ploo PROHSH
phrases.cultural_note: The Flon district is full of restaurants, bars, and cafes in converted warehouses.

responses.english: There are several in the area. Look around the square.
responses.phonetic: eel ee ahn ah plu-ZYUHR dahn luh kar-TYAY. ruh-gar-DAY oh-TOOR duh lah PLAHS
responses.french: Il y en a plusieurs dans le quartier. Regardez autour de la place.

phrases.text_local: Y a-t-il une vie nocturne animée ?
phrases.cultural_note: The Flon has nightclubs, bars, live music venues, and restaurants. It's where young Lausanne locals go out.

responses.english: Yes, the Flon is lively at night: bars, clubs, and concerts.
responses.phonetic: wee, luh FLOHN eh ah-nee-MAY luh SWAHR: bar, klub ay kohn-SAIR
responses.french: Oui, le Flon est animé le soir : bars, clubs et concerts.

phrases.cultural_note: The Flon has boutique shops, design stores, and the 'Mall of Lausanne' — a modern shopping center in a converted warehouse.

responses.english: Yes, the Flon has boutique shops, design stores, and the 'Mall of Lausanne' shopping center.
responses.french: Oui, le Flon abrite des boutiques de créateurs, des magasins de design et le centre commercial 'Mall of Lausanne'.

phrases.text_local: Quelle station de métro dessert le Flon ?
phrases.pronunciation: kel stah-SYOHN duh may-TROH day-SAIR luh flor
phrases.cultural_note: The Flon is directly accessible via Metro M1 (Flon station). It's also walking distance from the central train station.

responses.english: Flon station, line M1. Also walkable from the train station.
responses.phonetic: stah-SYON FLOHN, leen-yuh em UHN. say oh-SEE ah pyay duh-PWEE lah GAR
responses.french: Station Flon, ligne M1. C'est aussi à pied depuis la gare.
